layout.description: Top row: Controls & Animation; Middle rows: 3 coordinated plots; Bottom row: Insights panel & data table

plots.title: CO₂ per Capita by Country
plots.description: Shows the intensity of CO₂ emissions per person across the world for the selected year.

plots.title: GDP per Capita Over Time
plots.description: Line chart of GDP per capita for selected countries, animated by year.

plots.title: Economic, Health & Population Landscape
plots.description: 3‑D scatter of GDP per capita (x), Life Expectancy (y), Population (z) for the selected year.

plots.title: Country‑Year Snapshot
plots.description: Tabular view of all metrics for the current selections.

controls.label: Country
controls.description: Filter data by country. "All" shows all countries.

controls.label: Year
controls.description: Select the year to view. Range: 2000‑2020.

controls.label: Metric
controls.description: Choose the primary metric for the 3‑D scatter.

controls.label: Play / Pause
controls.description: Animate the year slider from start to finish.

insights_panel.title: Dynamic Insights
content_sections: Economic Growth: GDP per capita has risen steadily across most countries, with the fastest growth in emerging economies.
Health Outcomes: Life expectancy improvements correlate strongly with GDP per capita.
Environmental Impact: CO₂ per capita peaks in high‑income countries but is trending downward globally.
Population Dynamics: Rapid population growth in developing nations drives future demand.

animations.description: Smoothly transitions the year slider from 2000 to 2020, updating all plots.
Fade transition for choropleth color changes between years.

interactions.description: Filters all visualizations to the selected country or all countries.
Updates data for the selected year.
Changes the x‑axis of the 3‑D scatter to the chosen metric.
Starts or stops the year slider animation.
Highlights rows in the table that match the hovered country.
